final_answer: If someone tests positive for COVID-19, they should stay home except to get medical care, call ahead before visiting a healthcare provider, wear a face mask before entering the healthcare provider's office, cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue, regularly wash hands with soap and water, and avoid sharing personal household items. It is also important to self-isolate at home and let your healthcare team know about the positive test [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00125][node_b:7:2a2dee8a].
